metadata.title: Isabela Rodríguez Rocha | IRR
metadata.description: Recent Computing graduate building digital experiences through intentional code and curated architecture.

hero.description: Computing graduate passionate about building clean, purposeful software. Turning ideas into real products.

about.degreeDescription: Specialized in software development, covering algorithmic efficiency, software architecture, and user-centric design. Completed research in integrated software systems and cloud infrastructure.

items.title: Supervised Professional Practice
items.description: Collaborated with a team to build internal software tools for a non-profit organization, improving data management and streamlining daily operations. Gained hands-on experience in full-stack development, agile workflows, and delivering solutions aligned with real user needs.

items.title: Computer Technician
items.description: Provided technical support to individuals and small businesses, handling hardware repairs, software installations, and network setup. Extended this work into web development by building and deploying IsaStore CR, my own live e-commerce platform. Developed strong diagnostic skills and the ability to explain technical concepts in accessible language.

items.title: CAD Designer
items.description: Designed personalized dental treatment plans using specialized CAD software, crafting precise 3D models to guide orthodontic care. Strengthened my attention to detail, spatial reasoning, and ability to deliver high-quality work within tight deadlines.

projects.title: IsaStore CR
projects.description: E-commerce platform for electronics and accessories featuring a product catalog, shopping cart, and streamlined checkout — built and deployed end-to-end.

projects.title: Maquiz CR
projects.description: Artist portfolio with a dynamic gallery and project showcases, designed for a smooth and visually engaging browsing experience.

skills.title: Technical
skills.techSupportDesc: Hands-on experience diagnosing and resolving hardware and software issues. Skilled in system maintenance, network setup, and technical problem-solving to keep operations running smoothly.

contact.heading: Let's start a
contact.disclaimer: By clicking send, you acknowledge that your data will be handled with absolute digital integrity.
